report.summary: Cycle-close Apr 1 v11: 2 new learn pages scaffolded (Euler V2, Hyperlane) — both clean server components with metadata+structured data. 141 TS errors stable. 6/6 API routes intact, only 2/6 rate-limited in practice. 58 uncommitted files (up from 50 in v10). Deploy blocker persists.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: TypeScript check: 141 errors across 4 files — STABLE from v10. Same root causes: structured-data.examples.ts (40), lido-v3-stvaults-guide-2026 (94), crypto-arbitrage-strategies (4), rwa-yield-vs-defi-yield (3). Non-blocking (ignoreBuildErrors: true).

2 new learn pages since v10: euler-v2-modular-lending-guide-2026 and hyperlane-permissionless-interoperability-guide-2026. Both are clean server components with proper Metadata exports, OpenGraph tags, JSON-LD structured data (article+FAQ schemas), and Breadcrumb/BackToTop components. No 'use client' conflict.
Page audit: 610 published slugs, 109 (17.9%) missing page.tsx — UNCHANGED. 1,242 page.tsx files on disk (up 2 from v10's 1,240).
Modified pages this cycle: 10 learn pages + stablecoin-yield-tracker tool + published-pages.ts + 2 skill files + 2 report files.
Egress blocked — cannot verify live HTTP 200 status codes or production structured data rendering.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: 6/6 core API routes present and structurally intact: prices, defi-yields, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, market-dominance.

CORRECTION from v10: Only 2/6 routes actually enforce rate limiting in code (prices: 200 req/min, trending: 150 req/min). fear-greed has config but does NOT call checkRateLimit() in route handler. Previous reports overstated coverage at 3/6.
Cache TTLs verified: prices (60s), defi-yields (300s), fear-greed (600s), trending (300s), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (300s).
Fallback coverage: 5/6 routes have fallback (stale cache or static data). defi-yields still returns 500 on failure — persistent P1 gap.
Advanced cache infra (LRU cache in api-cache.ts, request dedup, circuit breaker) exists but none of the 6 routes use the shared utility — all implement manual in-memory caching.
No new API route changes detected this cycle.

sections.title: DevOps
items: HEAD: 3b2dd28 (fix: remove 'use client' from 4 learn pages) — UNCHANGED from v10. No new commits.
58 uncommitted files in working tree: 42 untracked + 16 modified. Up from 50 in v10 (8 new files, mostly reports and new learn pages).
New untracked assets: euler-v2 page, hyperlane page, plus incremental report files.
Build config stable: 8GB memory, standalone output, ignoreBuildErrors=true, concurrency=4.
DEPLOY BLOCKER PERSISTS: 58 uncommitted files need commit+push to trigger Vercel auto-deploy. Production still on 3b2dd28 deployment.
Pectra upgrade: 9 days (Apr 10). Tax deadline: 14 days (Apr 15). Time-sensitive content still undeployed.
Egress blocked — cannot verify Vercel dashboard or live deployment state.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DELTA SINCE V10: 2 new learn pages scaffolded (Euler V2, Hyperlane), 10 existing learn pages modified, stablecoin-yield-tracker refactored. Active content development cycle.
P0 BLOCKER (PERSISTENT ALL DAY): 58 uncommitted files need commit+push. Growing file count increases merge risk. Pectra (9 days) and tax deadline (14 days) content needs deployed for search traffic.
P1 CARRY-OVER: Rate limiter enforcement gap — only 2/6 routes protected (corrected from 3/6 in v10). defi-yields fallback data gap. 109 published slugs missing page.tsx.
P2 CARRY-OVER: 141 TS errors (stable). structured-data.examples.ts needs .tsx rename. api-cache.ts utility unused by any route.
SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: 2 new learn pages (Euler V2, Hyperlane) + modifications to 10 existing pages + stablecoin yield tracker refactor.
NEXT CYCLE PRIORITIES: (1) Commit+push to unblock deploy, (2) Rate limiter integration for 4 unprotected routes, (3) defi-yields fallback data.
NO NEW BLOCKERS requiring Jefe's attention beyond persistent commit+push action.
